title: teucrium flavum var. glabatum
intro: Teucrium flavum var. glabatum, also known as the yellow germander or Stinking Jonathan, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Teucrium flavum var. glabatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. It can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
